name: Water
description: Universal polar solvent and the backbone medium for aqueous chemistry, hydrolysis and biochemical systems.
hazardNotes: Process risk comes mainly from contamination or temperature/pressure conditions

spectralReferences.label: PubChem compound record
spectralReferences.notes: Compound identity, linked annotations and downloadable records.

name: Ethanol
description: A protic solvent and commodity alcohol used in synthesis, purification and fuel-related process chemistry.
hazardNotes: Vapor management required in process design

spectralReferences.label: PubChem compound record
spectralReferences.notes: Compound record with linked properties and source references.

name: Acetic Acid
description: Simple carboxylic acid widely used in esterification, buffering and acetylation chemistry.
hazardNotes: Strong odor and vapor control required

spectralReferences.label: PubChem compound record
spectralReferences.notes: Useful as a central identity anchor for downstream spectral linking.

name: Benzene
description: Canonical aromatic ring system used as a reference motif for aromatic chemistry and substitution reactions.
hazardNotes: Industrial use demands strict exposure control

spectralReferences.label: PubChem compound record
spectralReferences.notes: Central reference entry for aromatic structure data.

name: Salicylic Acid
description: Aromatic hydroxy acid used as a key precursor in aspirin synthesis and functional group teaching examples.
hazardNotes: Handle as a fine powder with dust control

spectralReferences.label: PubChem compound record
spectralReferences.notes: Base structure record for aspirin route planning.

name: Acetic Anhydride
description: Strong acetylating reagent used in aspirin synthesis and a classic example of activated carboxylic acid chemistry.

spectralReferences.label: PubChem compound record
spectralReferences.notes: Identity anchor for acetylation reagent tracking.

name: Aspirin
description: Flagship small molecule for synthesis routes, purification workflows and structure-property demonstrations.
hazardNotes: Process quality matters more than acute hazard in this MVP context

spectralReferences.label: PubChem compound record
spectralReferences.notes: Core compound page with downloadable structure records.

spectralReferences.label: nmrshiftdb2 home
spectralReferences.notes: Use as an open source for NMR lookup and later ingestion.

name: Caffeine
description: Well-known heterocycle with enough complexity to show off 3D rendering, aromaticity and heteroatom-rich topology.
hazardNotes: Low process relevance in this MVP
Useful mainly as a rich structural demo

spectralReferences.label: PubChem compound record
spectralReferences.notes: A strong showcase molecule for structure search and linked annotation.

name: Carbon Dioxide
description: Simple linear molecule that helps benchmark the viewer for inorganic geometry and process emissions context.
hazardNotes: Pressure and ventilation dominate process safety
